paths.comment: Audio fingerprint bytes (sampleValues, audioHash) require precomputed per-(profile, sample-rate) byte tables — task 0071. docs/limits.md "Audio fingerprinting (OfflineAudioContext) is NOT spoofed at v0.3" carried over to v0.7 phase split.

Canvas hash + dataUrl spoofing requires precomputed hash maps for the standard probe payloads + per-pixel noise injection — task 0071. docs/limits.md "Canvas fingerprinting (HTMLCanvasElement.toDataURL) is NOT spoofed at v0.3" carried over to v0.7 phase split.
